accepted_claim: A public-data, development-only benchmark found no tested QML candidate that outperformed strong classical controls or qualified for a QML Gate 6 mission experiment from P001.
claim_boundary: D033-C accepts the release package and authorizes the v0.3.0 tag, source archive, and CITATION update only under the strict D031-C negative-claim boundary; it authorizes no DOI minting, model release, locked-data access, mission-loop execution, Gate 6 run, model fitting, QML invention claim, or quantum-advantage claim.
